description_long: This is a dark-colored, single-fuselage airplane with a streamlined, aerodynamic body and a mid-mounted straight wing configuration. The wings are marked with distinctive insignia, and the aircraft features a single engine pod mounted beneath the fuselage. The tail section is equipped with a twin vertical stabilizer in an H-tail arrangement, providing stability and control. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating a single pilot. The landing gear is visible and consists of two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel, suggesting a taildragger configuration.
description: A dark, streamlined airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a single under-fuselage engine pod, and a twin vertical stabilizer H-tail. The cockpit is front-mounted and enclosed, with visible taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and the central engine pod beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, under-fuselage engine pod, and the cockpit at the nose.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and the main landing gear under the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the wing insignia and tail structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single jet engine mounted beneath the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel, fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit likely configured for a single pilot.
